abstracts.abstract: Authorizes the city of Providence to issue not more than $25,000,000 in general obligation bonds and notes to fund the providence housing trust fund to finance affordable multi-family housing projects in the city.

bill.title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE CITY OF PROVIDENCE TO ISSUE NOT TO EXCEED $25,000,000 GENERAL OBLIGATION BONDS AND NOTES TO FUND THE PROVIDENCE  HOUSING TRUST FUND TO FINANCE AFFORDABLE  MULTI-FAMILY HOUSING PROJECTS IN THE CITY
